note: Faiyum is the direct installed agricultural-hydraulic site anchor for a generic Roman-period irrigation proxy
Jerusalem is the plan-required historic-site anchor for the AD 1 Second Temple and its AD 70 destruction current
Ravenna is the direct installed city-point proxy for Augustus' 27 BC military harbour at Classe to the southeast
Mainz is the direct installed city-point anchor for Drusus' 13/12 BC Mogontiacum legionary camp opposite the Main
Basel is the reviewed installed near-site anchor for the Kaiseraugst military camp beside Augusta Raurica after the Augustan 15 BC refoundation
